user_registration.description: Registers a new user with email and password.

user_login.description: Logs in a user and returns an access token.

add_workout.description: Adds a new workout for the logged-in user.

get_my_workouts.description: Retrieves all workouts for the logged-in user.

update_workout.description: Updates a specific workout for the logged-in user.

complete_workout_status.description: Marks a specific workout as completed for the logged-in user.

delete_workout.description: Deletes a specific workout for the logged-in user.
